items.title: Angular Beginners Mentorship Program
items.description: Mentored 5+ junior developers in Angular fundamentals, best practices, and career guidance over 6 months.

items.title: Frontend Developers Meetup Organizer
items.description: Organized and hosted monthly meetups for 50+ frontend developers sharing knowledge on modern web technologies.

items.title: Web Accessibility Workshop Instructor
items.description: Conducted workshops on WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards for 30+ developers from various organizations.

items.title: Code Review Volunteer
items.description: Volunteered to review code and provide constructive feedback for open-source projects and community members.
